stemHtml: Under what circumstances can the improved climb performance procedure be used?

options.a: If a stopway is available, the climb limited take-off mass and the climb gradient can be increased by decreasing V<sub>1</sub>.
options.b: If sufficient excess runway is available, the climb limited take-off mass and the climb gradient can be increased by increasing V<sub>2</sub>.
options.c: If a clearway is available, the climb limited take-off mass and the climb gradient can be increased by increasing V<sub>1</sub>.
options.d: If a sufficient excess runway is available, the climb limited take-off mass and the climb gradient can be increased by decreasing V<sub>2</sub>.
